description_long: This playground structure consists of a multi-functional climbing frame set on a circular green safety surface. The equipment features a central tower with a ladder, monkey bars, and various horizontal and vertical bars for climbing and swinging. To one side, there is a bench-like seat attached to a frame, possibly for balancing or resting. The structure is constructed from sturdy metal tubing, painted in a light color, and is designed for children to climb, hang, and traverse between different sections. The open design allows for visibility and supervision from all sides, with no enclosed or shaded areas. The overall layout encourages active play, coordination, and social interaction among children.
description: A metal multi-play climbing frame with ladders, monkey bars, and a bench, set on a circular green safety surface. The open, modern design supports climbing, swinging, and balancing activities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central tower with ladder, monkey bars, and adjacent climbing bars, with the bench visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal monkey bars and the full length of the climbing frame, with the bench structure more prominent on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central tower, the angled monkey bars, and the bench structure to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bench in the foreground and the climbing frame extending to the left, with the central tower visible.
